name: Ishihara Sangyo Kaisha, Ltd.
summary: Ishihara Sangyo Kaisha, Ltd. manufactures and sells organic and inorganic chemicals in Japan, Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Inorganic Chemicals, Organic Chemicals, and Other Businesses. The company offers titanium dioxide (TiO2) products, including white pigments under the TIPAQUE trade name for applications in paints, inks, plastics, paper, and other products; yellow pigments; and functional materials, such as ultrafine TiO2, ultrafine ZnO, electro-conductive materials, photocatalytic TiO2, high purity TiO2, titanium tetrachride, TiO2 for catalytic use, acicular type TiO2, and glass coating. It also provides environmental products, including gypsander, a gypsum-based neutral soil adjustment agent; Fix-All, a heavy metal absorber and insobilizer; and MT-V3, an iron oxide-based volatile organic compounds decomposer, as well as active materials for lithium ion battery titanate. In addition, the company offers agrochemicals, including herbicides, fungicides, insecticides, and nematicides; animal health products; pharmaceutical reagents; and CF3-Pyridine organic intermediates for use in the pharmaceutical research. Further, it is involved in construction and trading businesses. Ishihara Sangyo Kaisha, Ltd. was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
